globalMusicStyle.styleDescription: Industrial electronic music as the primary tone, blended with post-apocalyptic wasteland aesthetics. Battle scenes emphasize oppressive industrial noise and distorted guitar; emotional scenes use piano and strings to convey human warmth.

culturalContext.regionalInfluence: No regional restrictions; emphasizes civilization collapse

forbiddenInstruments.reason: Does not fit post-apocalyptic wasteland setting

tonalCharacteristics.keyTendency: Primarily minor, occasional atonal for unease
tonalCharacteristics.dynamicRange: From ppp (lonely piano solo) to fff (full industrial noise)

emotionalMapping.musicalTreatment: Distorted guitar + industrial percussion, fast cuts, dissonant intervals
Piano solo, minimal, extensive silence, occasional string backing

usage.description: Represents loneliness and survival instinct in the apocalypse

musicalCharacteristics.mood: Lonely, oppressive, with a glimmer of hope

usage.description: Sound when Lin Yuan activates corpse control ability

soundCharacteristics.description: Low-frequency resonance + electronic distortion, mystical and dangerous
